input.background: A parallel system consists of 3 independent components, each having 0.95 reliability. The system reliability is calculated using the formula $$R=1-(1-0.95)^3=0.9999$$.
input.question: What is the reliability function of the system when each component has an exponential failure time distribution with constant failure rate $\lambda_i$?

output.answer: If each of the $n$ independent components has an exponential failure time distribution with constant failure rate $\lambda_i$, the system reliability is $$R(t)=1-\prod_{i=1}^n\left(1-e^{-\lambda_i t}\right)$$.
